content.description:
Library for auto-generating SVG diagrams from item metadata. Returns DOM nodes for use with functional transclusion.

## Usage

Embed in any markdown document:

```markdown
![](item://diagram-lib?call=eventFlow)
```

## Exports

- `eventFlow(api, params)` — Declarative event flow diagram showing all `content.watches` wiring. Events on the left, subscriber items on the right, curved paths with filter annotations. Click any box to navigate to that item.

## See Also

- [Auto-Generated Diagrams](item://c0c0c0c0-005a-0000-0000-000000000000) — Idea item with full design notes
- [Event System](item://c0c0c0c0-0006-0000-0000-000000000000) — Declarative watches
- [Transclusion](item://c0c0c0c0-0035-0000-0000-000000000000) — Functional transclusion (`?call=`)
